posts.author: marieever (Marie-Eve Rocque)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I am trying to move items with their subitems to a different board.

This is done via an automation : when X status changes to something, then move item.

The thing is, if I was to move the item manually, it is possible to map out the subitem columns to the new board. Is there a way to do so in the automation like we do with the parent item?

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @marieever !

I assume most of not all of the subitems’ columns are the same between the two boards, possibly also having the same names?

If so, you should have no problem as the subitems’ values will be mapped automatically.

Hope this helps!

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
